articles.title: Scientists discover a protein switch that burns fat and blocks new fat cells

articles.title: How generative AI and physics can help design new antibiotics
articles.summary: By 2050, scientists estimate that antibiotic-resistant infections will be associated with more than 8 million deaths around the world every year.

articles.title: 'Stellar death is not the end': James Webb Space Telescope glimpses the fate of the solar system in a weird exoplanet orbiting a dead star
articles.summary: "It's like using a time machine to peer into the distant future of our solar system."

articles.title: Audacious mission to rescue NASA's falling telescope has launched

articles.title: 'Rocket's Red Glare': How NASA's Artemis 2 moon mission celebrated America's 250th birthday
articles.summary: NASA joined in the semiquincentennial celebrations this year by painting "America 250" on the rocket that launched the Artemis 2 astronauts around the moon.

articles.title: New species of ghost shark may have been found in Costa Rica
articles.summary: Costa Rican scientists may have discovered a new species of ghost shark in Pacific waters near Cabo Blanco and Cano Island.

articles.title: Great ape laughter reveals a hidden origin of human speech

articles.title: A volcano has erupted remnants of Earth's primordial magma ocean
articles.summary: Earth was once covered by a global magma ocean, which later cooled and crystallised – now traces of this primordial event have been found in magma from a young volcano in the Indian Ocean

articles.title: El Nino set to be 'strong', UN warns
articles.summary: El Nino is here and will quickly develop into a strong event between July and September, fueling the likelihood of extreme weather, the United Nations' climate agency warned Friday.
